data.body: Investigation: skill file exists at plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md with correct frontmatter (name: onboarding, user-invocable: true). Plugin manifest at marketplaces/digital-service-orchestra/plugins/dso/.claude-plugin/plugin.json registers skills via './skills/' directory scan. All relevant files are present. The 'Unknown skill' error is an intermittent Claude Code platform-level Skill tool resolution failure — not a plugin code defect. Fallback (reading SKILL.md directly) works reliably.
